agent_output: Wrote `.auto-agent/design.md` with the three-page checkout design and three structural items in the backlog; awaiting approval before dispatch.

auto_agent_files..auto-agent/design.md:
# Checkout flow design

Three pages: cart review, shipping address, payment.

## Routes

- POST /api/cart/checkout/init
- POST /api/cart/checkout/address
- POST /api/cart/checkout/payment

## State preservation

In-flight order persisted to `checkout_drafts` table keyed by user id.
